by: Claude Code + Playwright MCP (authenticated, live prod)
notes: Continues the public-surface set (01-17). Account bigtester420@gmail.com did not exist (Cowork signup never completed), so it was created here via the OTP flow (Resend), then driven. Both disposable accounts purged at closeout.

D1_signin_vehicle.desc: Post-verify welcome (You're verified, choose your vehicle)
2024 BMW X3 template card after filtering
X3 detail: 4-view wrap outline + 15 body panels + Start design

D2_brief_builder.desc: Start a new project dialog (name the design)
Empty editor canvas (entry to Design brief / Design with AI)
Brief step 1: wrap zones (full wrap default)
Brief step 3: Alpha Wolf logo uploaded + placed on Front Door + DPI quality warning
Brief step 5: Aggressive preset + cyan/black brand prompt
Brief step 10: catch-all notes (read verbatim by the assistant)

D3_review_generate_seam.desc: Brief Review summary + Generate seam (Generate 3 concepts, uses 1 credit)

D4_generation_studio.desc: Three AI concepts on the X3 (front), watermarked, before/after sliders + view switcher
View switcher: same concepts, driver-side view

D5_iteration.desc: Iteration chips (Brighter colors selected, auto-filled instruction)
Refined render (Vivid Electric Cyan & Deep Black), credit 4 to 3

D6_final.desc: Lock-in dialog (full quality, logo placed exactly, never AI-redrawn, free)
Final badge + full-quality no-watermark render + Open in editor / Download spec pack

D7_editor.desc: Editor: AI layers composited across all 4 views + logo
Editor driver side: AI wrap + real Alpha Wolf logo on the front door
Selection panel showing a locked AI image layer (Rear Quarter)

D8_export_pack.desc: Downloaded spec-pack PDF (4 pages, full provenance metadata)
PDF page 1: hero render + 2024 BMW X3 + QR to project
PDF page 2: vehicle dimensions + all four views
PDF page 3: colors, zone table (logo on Front Door), style
PDF page 4: material, tint, extras, shop quote block

D9_account_surfaces.desc: Projects list with the new project (per-user scoped)

D10_empty_error_states.desc: Find a shop: empty partner-network state

D11_shop_side.desc: Shop side signed-in: Your shop is live, printer/media setup coming next

notCaptured.zeroCreditWaitlistSheet: Not captured. Reaching it needs a 0 credit balance; draining 3 more credits would exceed the single-pipeline fal budget, and forcing it via a DB write would violate the capture-what-the-app-shows rule. Both source prompts list it as conditional. Already shipped + captured in the Goal 7 closeout set.
